title: Suspicious Bread
description: Really goofy mod that may or may not ruin the speedrun community. Some might call a speedrun with this mod a bread%
body:
HOLY JIMMINY PEOPLE ARE ACTUALLY PLAYING MY MOD
Very goofy mod that might be a cornerstone in the speedrun community but it might not be so humble me pls.

FEATURES AS OF 5.0.0 (OUT NOW BABY LESSGO)
Explore the poo biome, coming with a poo block, and poo temples!
The strange minecraft movie biome that has pink sheep as the floor
Strange but Ride-able steve npcs!
A cheese blade, sword and block
Explore the experimental... Spinky dimension (i couldnt think of a better name)
